summary: A day in which you let the path unfold one step at a time.

voice_notes.notes: Low conscientiousness reads as willingness to begin without a plan. We are not scolding; we are describing a player who trusts the next step will appear. Never moralise.

signal_moments: the email you started and did not finish
exemplars.output: You started writing a message, then put it down before you finished, and the walk you went on doubled back twice because you had not decided where you were going. None of this was a failure of intent. The intent simply chose to arrive in pieces.
exemplars.notes: Refuses the moral frame; ends by re-describing the behaviour as a valid mode rather than a flaw.
